fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bank account that you want to reconcile with the bank's statement.

fields.name: Statement No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the bank account statement.

fields.name: Statement Ending Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending balance shown on the bank's statement that you want to reconcile with the bank account.

fields.name: Statement Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on the bank account statement.

fields.name: Balance Last Statement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending balance shown on the last bank statement, which was used in the last posted bank reconciliation for this bank account.

fields.name: Total Transaction Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of values in the Statement Amount field on all the lines in the Bank Acc. Reconciliation and Payment Reconciliation Journal windows.

fields.name: Total Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of values in the Difference field on all lines in the Bank Acc. Reconciliation window that belong to the bank account reconciliation.

fields.name: Copy VAT Setup to Jnl. Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the program to calculate VAT for accounts and balancing accounts on the journal line of the selected bank account reconciliation.

fields.name: Bank Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bank account that you want to reconcile.

fields.name: Allow Duplicated Transactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to allow bank account reconciliation lines to have the same transaction ID. Although it’s rare, this is useful when your bank statement file contains transactions with duplicate IDs. Most businesses leave this toggle turned off.
